milestones.title: Foundation & First Project
milestones.unlock_statement: Sneha, you'll build a personal website using HTML and CSS, and host it on a live server, showing it off to your friends and family within the first month.

milestones.title: Core Skills Unlocked
milestones.unlock_statement: You will create a responsive UI component using CSS, and explain the box model and flexbox to a peer, without needing to look up the documentation, by the end of week 6.

milestones.title: Junior Dev Ready
milestones.unlock_statement: Sneha, you'll be able to implement a simple JavaScript functionality, like a To-Do list app, and debug it using Chrome DevTools, within the first two months, and show it to a potential employer.

milestones.title: Mid-Level Engineer
milestones.unlock_statement: You will design and implement a single-page application using a frontend framework, and present it to a product team, highlighting your problem-solving skills and design decisions, by month 4.

milestones.title: Senior Frontend Developer
milestones.unlock_statement: Sneha, you'll lead a team to build a complex UI feature, like a dashboard, and guide them through the development process, ensuring best practices and code quality, as you work towards your goal of building UI that real customers see.

milestones.title: Technical Lead
milestones.unlock_statement: You will architect a scalable frontend architecture for a product company, and communicate the technical vision to stakeholders, leveraging your knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and your experience building live websites.

milestones.title: Expert Frontend Developer
milestones.unlock_statement: Sneha, you'll be recognized as an expert in the frontend development community, and will be able to mentor junior developers, and contribute to open-source projects, as you continue to build UI that makes a real impact on customers, and work in a company that values what you build.
